text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
All that's left is to put away this book.<n>There!
Guess now it's time for the<n>next task.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey! I'm helping the school<n>librarian out.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The upcoming ticket war is going to<n>be a long and
bloody affair, so I have<n>to do whatever I can to
build up my<n>karma!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
In other words, she's trying to<n>increase her luck
for an upcoming<n>ticket raffle.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Uh... Digital. Ummm, I-I'm so sorry to<n>bother you,
but...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Rob Roy! Oh, do you have some more<n>work for
me? What should I do?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank you so much! Actually, there<n>are some
overdue books out that I'd<n>like to get back.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Would you mind coming with me to<n>collect them
from the people on this<n>list?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Sure thing. Leave all the negotiations<n>to me,
please.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
You're a l-lifesaver! Everyone on the<n>list is a
trainer, so I was a bit<n>anxious...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It can be a bit unnerving to deal with<n>adults you
don't know, huh? But I<n>sometimes deal with
strangers while<n>engaging with my pastimes, so
I'm<n>used to it!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Let's get going then, yeah? Who's<n>first on the
list?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Ummm, actually... it's <username>.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
...I had a feeling. All right, Trainer, let's<n>head to
your office.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Just, wow. I mean, I kindaexpected it, but... your desk space islooking like a new layer of the earth's strata.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Could this be the reason you haven't<n>returned it
yet? I'm sure it's lost<n>somewhere in this pile...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Well, these things happen... Let's<n>clear up this
mess. I'll go get some<n>boxes.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
All right... Book, stationery, trash,<n>book, book, DVD,
book, book, trash,<n>pen, book...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Y-you're so fast! Organizing<n>everything by type
without even<n>looking... and without a single
mistake!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ah, found the library book. But while<n>we're at it,
let's get everything put<n>away into these boxes!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
You tidied the place up in the blink of<n>an eye.
You've even organized all the<n>books by category
and stored all the<n>stationery so it's easy to use.
choice_data_list: You're really good at tidying up!
You're really good at tidying up!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I've got a ton of stuff in my room, so<n>I'm really
used to storing books and<n>merch and stuff.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Let's keep up the pace and go get<n>the books from
the other trainers!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Groan... What is going on in thoseoffices? That was certainly no placeto bring Rob Roy.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: We're straight up doingarchaeological excavations for thoseoverdue books! We managed to tidythings up, but why are all the trainers like that?!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
We really cleaned everything up<n>quick. Or, I mean,
you did... I was<n>mostly watching... Sorry about
that...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's okay. I was the one who offered<n>to help in the
first place. Plus, this<n>way, I'm racking up tons of
karma.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
K-karma? Still, it looks like we've got<n>a long ways
to go...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I've got to figure somethingout. If I can't finish everything, mykarma's gonna take a hit...
choice_data_list: Let's reduce the time we spend on each person!

All we can do is hunker down and clean each
room properly.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
...That's right. Let's change<n>strategies to just
getting the books<n>back!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
First, let's make some cards<n>requesting everyone
return the<n>books. That'll reduce the time we
spend explaining to everyone.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Then we'll pass out all the cards to<n>the trainers on
the list. This way, we<n>can split up the work!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Got it! If it's just passing out cards, I<n>think I can
do it without getting too<n>nervous.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I've already got a handle on each<n>Umamusume's
routine, so that<n>should help me track down their
trainers! Let's get these cards out<n>lickety-split!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
...My bad on being so late returning<n>the book. That
said, it's pretty<n>impressive you managed to find
me<n>in this underpass, hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And that was the last one. Wow, we<n>really got that
done quick!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Thank you so much for all of<n>your help,
Digital. I appreciate it, really.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Spending your days working to build<n>up good
karma... You're like a hero! I<n>really look up to you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hnnngh! Th-that smile... So bright!<n>Hyuuuuh!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(I mustn't tell her I was only doing it<n>to improve
my odds at scoring tickets!<n>I can't!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah... Merit-making is something<n>I've always
tried to make a habit of...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Um, well... Please try not to overwork<n>yourself.
Thanks again for all of your<n>help today. You truly
are a lifesaver!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ha...aaaaagh... Rob Roy's smile... Her<n>genuine
kindness... Aahh, it sets my<n>spirit at ease...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Recharge complete! I've basked in<n>the glory of an
oshi, and I'm back in<n>business!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Now I can tackle the rest of the<n>cleaning we put
aside!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Book collection and housekeeping,<n>check and
check! Honestly, there<n>were a few places I
thought would be<n>faster to just burn down and
rebuild<n>from scratch, but I'm glad to be<n>finished!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Seriously?! You finished the whole listand went back to clean theiroffices?!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Despite how tired you were<n>before, you still
worked your magic!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
A smile like yours would spring me<n>back to life
countless times!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what a line! You're like the main<n>character
from an Umamusume hero<n>series!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hwah! The way your eyes shine is...<n>s-so cute...
Truly, the greatest reward<n>there is...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wait... Th-this isn't costing me any of<n>my good
karma, is it? It's a freebie,<n>right?!
